name: Flipt
tagline: Flipt is a fully managed feature flag solution that enables you to keep your feature flags and remote config next to your code in Git.
description:
Flipt is a fully managed feature flag solution that enables you to keep your feature flags and remote config next to your code in Git.

Docs: https://docs.flipt.io/cloud/overview?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  flipt:
    image: docker.flipt.io/flipt/flipt:latest
    volumes:
      - flipt-data:/var/opt/flipt
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - wget
        - --spider
        - --quiet
        - http://127.0.0.1:8080
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 15
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42035:8080
volumes:
  flipt-data: null
